description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:3.0 Docker image. In the global before_script run apt-get -y update, apt-get -y upgrade, gem install bundler, bundle config set --local path vendor/bundle, and bundle install --jobs $(nproc). Define a spec job in the default test stage that executes bundle exec rake spec and runs on runners tagged "shared", inheriting the before_script. No caches, artifacts, services, or additional rules are defined.
